main.name: Jayraj Nimbalkar
main.tagline: Senior Technology Leader | Principal Engineer | Fintech & Digital Banking
main.description: I Build, Lead, and Own Mission-Critical Financial Technology Platforms
main.bio:
Senior Technology Leader with 13+ years of experience architecting and delivering mission-critical platforms across fintech, digital banking, savings, lending, payments, and SaaS. Proven track record of driving end-to-end digital transformation, defining technology strategy and roadmaps, and scaling cloud-native platforms in highly regulated financial services environments.

Currently serving as CTO & Principal Architect at Astro Advanced Analytics, where I architect and own a multi-tenant Amazon seller intelligence platform from the ground up—spanning platform engineering, data architecture, API design, and full-stack product delivery. As a strategic AI enabler, I am driving enterprise-wide AI adoption — from embedding AI-augmented development workflows and intelligent process automation to deploying AI-powered customer service solutions — establishing governance frameworks and usage policies that ensure responsible adoption while maximising operational efficiency across the business.

Previously as Head of Technology at FCamara, I led the full digital transformation of Birmingham Bank—migrating legacy infrastructure to Mambu, nCino, and Azure, implementing biometric KYC/KYB, and delivering a cloud-native savings, lending, and omnichannel operations platform. These initiatives onboarded 9,000+ customers, grew deposit accounts by 225%, automated 25,000+ transactions, and processed £600M+ in digital payments—all while maintaining 99.9% uptime and ensuring PCI DSS, GDPR, FCA, and financial services compliance.

Core Expertise

  • Technology Strategy & Roadmapping — Aligning engineering execution with business objectives, advising executive committees, and shaping global delivery strategies across the UK, US, Europe, UAE, and LATAM.
  • Enterprise & Solution Architecture — Microservices, event-driven architecture (EDA), domain-driven design (DDD), CQRS, API-first design, and service mesh patterns.
  • Cloud & Infrastructure — Azure, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and multi-cloud strategy.
  • Engineering Leadership — Built and mentored high-performing, cross-functional teams of 35+ engineers, fostering a culture of ownership, continuous improvement, and engineering excellence.
  • DevOps & SRE — CI/CD pipelines, observability, monitoring, incident management, site reliability engineering, and operational resilience.
  • Agile Delivery — Scrum, Kanban, SAFe; experienced in scaling agile practices across distributed, multi-vendor teams.
  • Security & Compliance — PCI DSS, GDPR, FCA regulatory compliance, ISO 27001 awareness, threat modelling, and secure SDLC practices.
  • Data & Analytics — Data platform engineering, real-time analytics, ETL/ELT pipelines, and data-driven decision-making.
  • Vendor & Stakeholder Management — Third-party integrations, vendor evaluation, contract negotiation, budget ownership, and board-level reporting.
  • SaaS Product Engineering — Multi-tenant architecture, platform scalability, feature flagging, and product-led growth enablement.

Technical Stack

.NET Core C# Node.js TypeScript React Azure AWS Kubernetes Docker Terraform GitHub Actions Azure DevOps RabbitMQ Kafka Redis SQL Server PostgreSQL MongoDB

Driven by a passion for technology and strategic impact, I focus on aligning engineering excellence with business growth—delivering scalable, secure solutions and empowering teams to innovate in highly regulated markets.

And despite all the leadership titles… I'm still a developer at heart—often found scratching my head over complex code just like day one.

education.description: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Information Technology from Pune University, India. Graduated with First Class with Distinction.

work.title: CTO & Principal Architect

~80% Keepa chart compression via dual-storage strategy (Cosmos DB hot reads + Blob cold archival)
work.description:
As CTO & Principal Architect at Astro Advanced Analytics, I design, build, and own Astro Advanced Analytics — a multi-tenant SaaS B2B platform purpose-built for Amazon resellers. The platform delivers real-time product analytics, profitability intelligence, and purchase workflow automation, serving three client surfaces (React SPA, Chrome extension, Admin dashboard) from a single API backend.

Architecture & Engineering:
- Designed a 14-project layered solution with strict inward dependency rules, keeping inner layers completely free of hosting and transport concerns.
- Built an event-driven bulk processing pipeline where request acceptance is fully decoupled from processing. Bulk operations return immediately with an operationId; a hosted service processes in configurable chunks while Azure SignalR delivers live progress.
- Engineered a configurable Quota & Feature Enforcement Engine (ILimitEngine) that evaluates plan tiers, company-level overrides, and cooldown gates independently of all business services — enabling instant plan changes without code deployments.
- Implemented a dual-storage strategy for Keepa market data: GZip compression achieving ~80% reduction, Cosmos DB for hot partition-key reads, Azure Blob Storage for cost-effective cold archival.
- Led a zero-downtime auth migration from Azure AD B2C to Stytch, simultaneously supporting three auth systems via normalised claims middleware — all downstream code remained auth-provider-agnostic.
- Configured OpenTelemetry-first observability with distributed tracing across HTTP, ORM, gRPC, and message bus, with a custom telemetry initializer injecting authenticated user context into every trace.

Platform Scale:
- 27 API domain controllers · 220+ automated tests (xUnit, Moq, SQLite in-memory EF) · 14 solution projects · 3 client surfaces · 13+ external integrations

work.title: Principal Engineer / Head of Technology

£600M+ in fully automated digital payments processed
Designed FCamara's Global Delivery Framework, reducing deployment time by 80%
Advised ExCo of BakerOnline (€350M platform for 800+ SMBs) on technical growth strategy
work.description:
As Principal Engineer / Head of Technology at FCamara, I led high-impact digital transformation engagements across fintech and digital banking, while shaping FCamara's global delivery capabilities.

Birmingham Bank (Key Engagement — 2022–2025):
- Led the end-to-end digital modernization of Birmingham Bank, replacing legacy CORTEN infrastructure with cloud-native systems on Mambu, Azure, and AWS using an event-driven microservices architecture.
- Directed the build and rollout of Online Banking, Savings Product Marketplace, Omnichannel Platform, regulatory reporting pipelines, and full transaction automation.
- Delivered end-to-end Direct Debit capability, Confirmation of Payee (CoP) validation load-tested at 10,000 daily transactions, and automated transactional flows with Lloyds Bank.
- Architected enterprise data warehouse and defined Data Dictionary and Single Customer View (SCV).
- Integrated 15+ fintech providers: Mambu, CallSign, nCino, ClearBank, LexisNexis, Tink, Equifax, Cloudflare, AccessPay, ComplyAdvantage, Banfico, Royal Mail.
- Scaled and managed a cross-functional global team of 25+, fostering a security-first, PCI DSS & GDPR-compliant culture.

FCamara Strategic Work:
- Designed and operationalized FCamara's Global Delivery Framework, enabling delivery from Brazil, Portugal, UK, US, and Belgium — reducing talent deployment time by 80%.
- Advised the ExCo of BakerOnline (€350M digital commerce platform, 800+ SMBs) on technical growth strategy, platform scalability, and build-vs-buy decisions.
- Led large-scale technology due diligence efforts and partnered with C-level stakeholders to align technology roadmaps with strategic objectives.

Business Impact:
- ~3,000% growth in onboarded customers (300 → 9,000+)
- ~315% growth in deposit accounts
- 100% automation of transaction processing (0 → 19,141 transactions)
- £600M+ processed digitally

work.description:
As Senior Agile Developer and later Tech Lead at VillaPlus, I played a key role in modernizing the company's booking and payments platform over 5+ years across two locations — beginning in Pune, India and relocating to St Albans, UK in December 2018.

I was part of the core team that migrated a large monolithic system into a domain-driven microservices architecture on Azure, covering domains including Booking (Basket & Checkout), Payments, Car Hire, and Flight Booking.

Key Contributions:
- Developed a unique, plug-and-play injectable payment interface in JavaScript, enabling seamless integration with Braintree, NMI, Trust Payments, and AccessPay for both card transactions and Direct Debits.
- Led the development of 'MyVillaPlus', an Angular and .NET Core-based booking management platform, managing a team of junior developers.
- Contributed to architectural design, disaster recovery planning, monitoring, alerting, CI/CD pipelines, and automated backup processes.
- Progressed from Senior Developer to Tech Lead, taking ownership of delivery quality and team engineering standards.

work.description:
I began my professional journey with Atos as an Associate Engineer, working across multiple high-profile enterprise projects and client engagements. This role gave me early exposure to European engineering standards, cross-border collaboration, and enterprise-grade software delivery.

Key Projects:
- Rio Olympics 2016 app suite
- BMW Financial Services platform
- NHS OHS enterprise system

During my three years at Atos, I developed strong foundations in .NET development, SDLC best practices, and agile delivery, while continuously learning from experienced European engineering teams. My commitment to quality, ownership, and technical excellence enabled me to progress rapidly from Associate Engineer to Senior Software Engineer.

products.name: Astro Advanced Analytics
products.tagline: Amazon Seller Analytics & Product Intelligence Platform
products.summary:
Astro Advanced Analytics is a multi-tenant SaaS platform purpose-built for Amazon resellers. It delivers real-time product analytics, profitability intelligence, and purchase workflow automation — enabling sellers to make data-driven sourcing decisions at scale.

Architected around an event-driven processing core, a configurable quota enforcement engine, and deep Amazon ecosystem integration. The platform serves three client surfaces — a React SPA, Chrome browser extension, and admin dashboard — from a single API backend built across a 14-project layered solution.

architectureHighlights.title: Event-Driven Bulk Processing Pipeline
architectureHighlights.detail: Request acceptance is fully decoupled from processing. Bulk operations spanning thousands of items return immediately with an operation identifier; a hosted service processes work in configurable chunks while real-time connection channels deliver live progress to the client throughout multi-minute jobs.

architectureHighlights.title: Configurable Quota & Feature Enforcement
architectureHighlights.detail: A dedicated limit engine evaluates plan tiers, company-level overrides, and cooldown gates independently of all business services. Features are gated at the subscription plan tier — enabling per-tier rollouts, instant enable/disable per company, and A/B testing without code deployments.

architectureHighlights.title: Dual-Storage Market Data Strategy
architectureHighlights.detail: Large market history payloads (price, rank, offer data) are compressed and split across two storage tiers: a NoSQL document store for fast partition-key reads on recent data, and object storage with cache headers for cost-effective archival. Compression achieves approximately 80% size reduction.

architectureHighlights.title: Layered Solution Architecture
architectureHighlights.detail: A 14-project solution with strict inward dependency rules keeps inner layers completely free of hosting and transport concerns. This allows the service layer to be tested in isolation with an in-memory database without mocking or external dependencies.

architectureHighlights.title: OpenTelemetry-First Observability
architectureHighlights.detail: Distributed tracing auto-instruments the complete request chain — HTTP, ORM, gRPC, and message bus — via the OpenTelemetry SDK. A custom telemetry initializer injects authenticated user context into every trace, enabling user-level debugging in Application Insights without manual instrumentation.

challengesSolved.outcome: Sub-cent accuracy is required across multi-component fee structures (referral fees, fulfilment fees, shipping, and prep costs). Derived financial metrics are stored in the database on calculation rather than recomputed on read — enabling real-time filtering and sorting on ROI, margin, and break-even across large product catalogues.

challengesSolved.challenge: High-Volume Data Ingestion Without IO Saturation
challengesSolved.outcome: Market history payloads can reach 1–5 MB per product. An ~80% compression ratio significantly reduces storage and bandwidth costs. Concurrent write limits prevent connection pool exhaustion when ingesting hundreds of products simultaneously during bulk upload operations.

The platform simultaneously supported three authentication systems during a live provider migration. Middleware normalises claims from all providers into a single internal format — keeping all downstream controllers and services completely auth-provider-agnostic and requiring no per-endpoint changes.

Bulk enrichment operations take minutes to complete. Persistent connection channels scoped to individual operations deliver live progress without long-polling. The message-driven event pipeline keeps the processing layer fully decoupled from the real-time transport layer.
